input.notes:
When downloading there is an option to access metadata, however, sign in is required to access it. Similarly, the dataset can be exported or downloaded, exports are available without signing in however downloads (to access CSV) require sign in and are not credited here. Data published by each age (not 5 year groups) but marked for credit.


Review note: at time of review 8/15, NSO and line ministries loaded very slowly. The SDG indicators on the ODFA portal all have UN stats division as the source, due to this they were deleted from review.

Indicator note: Added xlsx at review. Checked 2022 data from OPFA and the dataset now is only 2021 data, redundant.
